choices.text: Solve L1 throughput (~7 TPS) + fees ($0.50-50+). Off-chain payment channels via 2-of-2 multisig; on-chain only for open/close. Near-instant + sub-cent + millions of TPS theoretical.
Penalty mechanism: if counterparty broadcasts old state, you have CSV time window to broadcast breach tx with penalty key — take 100% of channel. Watchtowers monitor when offline.
HTLC chains: pay X if preimage of H revealed before time T. Each hop locks funds; preimage revelation cascades back through chain. Atomic — all succeed or all rollback.
No inbound liquidity. Solutions: Lightning Pool, pay LNBig/Bitrefill for inbound channel, Loop-out to convert outbound to inbound, submarine swaps. Always one-sided initially.
LND/CLN + Bitcoin Core full node + Static Channel Backup offsite + watchtower for offline protection. Without these, drive failure or old-state attack can lose funds.
